mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS UserAccount ( user_id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE, password VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, display_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, role VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL ) COMMENT='系统登录用户表'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO UserAccount(username, password, display_name, role) VALUES ('admin', '123456', '管理员', 'ADMIN'), ('scout', '123456', '球探用户', 'SCOUT'), ('viewer', '123456', '访客用户', 'VIEWER')
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, username AS username, display_name AS displayName, role AS role FROM UserAccount WHERE username = #{username} AND password = #{password}
